propositions: Verify that a CLAUDE.md containing a single @AGENTS.md import line loads AGENTS.md into Claude Code's context at launch.
Document observed precedence and nesting behavior of the @AGENTS.md import.
If the import fails, choose a fallback mechanism (symlink CLAUDE.md to AGENTS.md vs content-copy-with-sync).
Spike confirmed PASS: the @AGENTS.md project-level import expands into context with no approval prompt, so the import mechanism is adopted with no symlink fallback.
Imported files load at launch without reducing context, so AGENTS.md must be kept lean to realize token savings.
No stray spike files should remain in the repo working tree after the spike.
